messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
What it is: Role benchmarking, slice 2: the Role Leaderboard reaches the human on the backlog dashboard
What it solves: SCOPE IS (a) AND ONLY (a). The human was offered three readings — (a) benchmark results only,
(b) all efficiency numbers as one story (cost/ticket + burn rate + leaderboard), (c) the
presentation layer generally. He picked (a). Do NOT quietly widen this into (b) or (c). BL-338
(cost-per-ticket diag…
How it works: The leaderboard names a best, a best value, and a cheapest acceptable model per role
